channel.title: Library on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Library on Arrans github.io

item.title: golang-ical
item.description: A ICS / ICal parser and serialiser for Golang.

item.title: tsobjectutils
item.description: Some typescript objects I use in a couple repos

item.title: datastoreutils
item.description: Basic google cloud datastore helpers

item.title: dsquery
item.description: A google datastore query aggregator and compiler with some minor enhancements

item.title: gaelogger
item.description: Another google apps engine go logger this one is for the new go111+ world..

item.title: go-gui-projects
item.description: A list of Go GUI projects

item.title: md2png
item.description: Very basic generated md2png

item.title: txtar
item.description: txtar enhanced and with a cli tool

item.title: dart-libayatana-appindicator-glib
item.description: Ayatana Application Indicators Library (Dart port)

item.title: dart_xdg_status_notifier_item
item.description: Allows status notifications (i.e. system tray) on Linux desktops using the StatusNotifierItem specification.

item.title: golang-diff
item.description: A multiline string comparsion library (and tool.)

item.title: strings2
item.description: Some golang string helper functions focused around case transformation but other things in the future.

item.title: dart_unix_single_instance
item.description: A library which uses unix sockets to ensure a single instance

item.title: fork-tray_manager
item.description: This plugin allows Flutter desktop apps to defines system tray.

item.title: go-be-lazy
item.description: Varidct based behavoural lazy evaluation

item.title: lookup
item.description: A golang structure based element lookup library

item.title: go-pattern
item.description: image.Image patterns

item.title: go-evaluator
item.description: A simple evaluation markup with a simple parser too.

item.title: flutter_nodelistview
item.description: A flutter widget which uses an infinite list of double linked nodes

item.title: dartobjectutils
item.description: Dart Constructor Type Enforcement / Conversion

item.title: go-consume
item.description: String and slice consumption librareis

item.title: go-rfc5849-hmac
item.description: Implementation of rfc5849 hmac wrapper
